raw_log_normalization: pulled via `rtk proxy gh run view --job <id> --log` and stripped the leading <job>\t<step>\t prefix per line so timestamps lead each line, matching v1.3 raw.log format.
notes: Single failed pytest functional test in tests/functional/test_truststore.py::test_no_truststore_can_install[GitHub]. The surface is `AssertionError: Script returned code: 1` but the underlying root cause is GitHub returning 502 Bad Gateway when pip tries to fetch https://github.com/pypa/pip-test-package/archive/refs/heads/master.zip — visible at lines 6526/6531. The test was retried 3 times by pytest-rerunfailures (lines 6263, 6359, 6390) before final fail at 6392, then printed in the FAILURES block at 6402-6532 and again in the short test summary at 6649. flaky_or_transient = true; failure_category = network_or_flaky. Selected as Batch 1 case 2 — also fills a v1.3 gap (v1.3 has zero network_or_flaky and zero flaky_or_transient cases). The repo's CI was running on main branch, which makes the failure especially clear-cut as transient infrastructure rather than a bug in the PR under review.
